CustomField.formula: CASE(Text(Region__c), "S1T1", "1", "S1T2", "1", "S1T3", "1", "S2T1", "2", "S2T2", "2", "S2T3", "2", "S2T4", "2", "S2T5", "2", "S3T1", "3", "S3T2", "3", "S3T3", "3", "S4T1", "4", "S4T2", "4", "S4T3", "4", "WW", "Wellness Works", "WW1", "Wellness Works", "WW2", "Wellness Works", "WW3", "Wellness Works", "WW4", "Wellness Works", "CM", "Care Management", "No Region Entered")
CustomField.label: Section
